preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)
notes: v1.2.0: HeyGen Video Agent (prompt-to-video), deep security hardening across OAuth / hook guard / attribution, and a Mac license-activation fix.
whatsNew: New HeyGen Video Agent: describe your ad in plain English, get a finished avatar video back
Major security pass — OAuth flows, hook guard, and attribution tightened after adversarial review; Shopify OAuth now validates CSRF state
Mac trial-expiry screen now opens the license-key modal directly — no more blank screens when activating Pro
